---
title: "Quarto 2"
author: "Oluchi Nnadi"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

```{r}
mpg %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = displ, y = hwy, color = drv)) +
  # Updated: replaced 'size' with 'linewidth' and added 'formula'
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE, linewidth = 1, alpha = 0.5) +
  # Jittered points
  geom_jitter(aes(fill = drv), shape = 21, color = "white", size = 3, stroke = 1) +
  # Facet by cylinder count
  facet_wrap(~cyl, labeller = label_both) +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "The Efficiency Paradox: Engine Size vs. Highway MPG",
    subtitle = "Faceted by cylinder count; color-coded by drivetrain",
    x = "Engine Displacement (liters)",
    y = "Highway Miles per Gallon",
    color = "Drivetrain",
    fill = "Drivetrain"
  ) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray80"),
    strip.text = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold")
  )
```
